query: I want my status label to sit at the far right edge of its box, so I set :halign "end" on the label. But it just stays glued to the left next to the other widgets — halign "end" does absolutely nothing. Why?
expected_behavior: Routes to ALIGNMENT.md (the alignment & expand behavior model)

Explains that halign only positions a widget WITHIN the extra space its parent allocates — with no extra space (the default hexpand false), the label is already at its minimum size, so halign has no visible effect
Shows the fix: add :hexpand true so the label claims the remaining space, then :halign "end" pulls it to the right edge
Mentions the same rule applies vertically (valign needs vexpand)
notes: Guards against the single most common eww alignment mistake: halign/valign without hexpand/vexpand. The skill's mental model (alignment positions within parent-allocated space, not the screen) is exactly what a naive answer misses — it would suggest margins, a spacer in the wrong place, or claim halign is broken.
